commit.message: ui bug fixes and improved security
more fixes fixed ui added more securre hmac auth
added egg support images store updated ui
remove unecessary files
remade ui for console fully and improved panel and fixed bugs
verbose Docker pull/create events in daemon; mobile console lifecycle writes + input lock; account 2-col compact grid plus Panel fixed
security hardening, real-time lifecycle feedback, UI overhaul

some massive changes

commit.message:
Fix some weird error i got

Failed to generate credentials

(HTTP code 409) unexpected - Conflict. The container name "/alsftp_3d582f37-f57e-403a-9fa5-1f59c9efae8c" is already in use by container "457b942d66471199c3c5aff4cad38dac5457140632ae007b25723ea34d9ee3a5". You have to remove (or rename) that container to be able to reuse that name.

addons.name: Modrinth Store
addons.description: Browse, search, and install Minecraft mods and modpacks from Modrinth directly inside your AirLink admin panel.
addons.longDescription: The Modrinth Store addon integrates Modrinth directly into your AirLink panel. Browse, search, and install mods or modpacks from the admin panel with full feature control, progress bars, and a clean UI.
addons.author: g-flame
features: Browse and search the Modrinth mod database
Admin panel integration with sidebar entry

addons.name: parachute
addons.description: Parachute is an AirLink Panel addon that integrates with Google Drive for server backups and file management. It handles authentication, token storage, and server-specific operations using server UUIDs..
addons.longDescription: Parachute is an AirLink Panel addon that integrates with Google Drive for server backups and file management. It handles authentication, token storage, and server-specific operations using server UUIDs.
addons.author: g-flame
